user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new expense head, so that recruitment expenses can be categorised
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Expense Head screen; When I click Add new expense head and enter a Name and Description; Then the expense head is created and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view expense heads with their name and description, so that I can review configured categories
acceptance_criteria: Given expense heads exist; When I open the Expense Head list; Then each entry shows its Name and Description

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the expense head list, so that I see the latest entries
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Expense Head screen; When I click refresh; Then the list reloads with current data
